meaning: /adv.细菌抑Ik/adj.细菌抑制抵频,阻止细菌繁帜,阻止细菌繁殖法的撤ǖ
examples: Conclusion: Mangoferin monosodium salt has good bacteriostatic action.
It is not affected by any antibiotics or common bacteriostatic agents.
Objective To know the bacteriostatic efficacy and toxicity of aloe extract.
Some antibiotics, such as the aminoglycoside class, are also bactericidal in some infections but bacteriostatic in others.
Tetracycline is an example of a bacteriostatic agent.
